case_title: JOSEPH LOVITT VS. BAY QUACKERS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOVITT, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY QUACKERS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $26,563.89 PRINCIPAL, $151.44 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,125.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
